questions.hindi: मैं तैर सकता हूँ।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I can swim."

questions.hindi: वह अंग्रेजी बोल सकती है।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "She can speak English."

questions.hindi: क्या मैं जा सकता हूँ?
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Can I go?"

questions.hindi: वे यह काम कर सकते हैं।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "They can do this work."

questions.hindi: हम कल मिल सकते हैं।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "We can meet tomorrow."

questions.hindi: क्या तुम मुझे मदद कर सकते हो?
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Can you help me?"

questions.hindi: मैं यह नहीं कर सकता।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I cannot do this."

questions.hindi: वह गाड़ी चला सकता है।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He can drive a car."

questions.hindi: क्या आप दोबारा बोल सकते हैं?
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Can you say that again?"

questions.hindi: मैं यह समझ सकता हूँ।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I can understand this."

questions.hindi: वे समय पर पहुँच सकते हैं।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "They can arrive on time."

questions.hindi: क्या मैं एक सवाल पूछ सकता हूँ?
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Can I ask a question?"

questions.hindi: वह बहुत अच्छा गाना गा सकती है।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "She can sing very well."

questions.hindi: हम यह project पूरा कर सकते हैं।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "We can complete this project."

questions.hindi: क्या तुम आज आ सकते हो?
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Can you come today?"

questions.hindi: मैं इसे ठीक कर सकता हूँ।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I can fix this."

questions.hindi: वह किसी भी भाषा सीख सकता है।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He can learn any language."

questions.hindi: क्या मैं यहाँ बैठ सकता हूँ?
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Can I sit here?"

questions.hindi: हम इसे बेहतर बना सकते हैं।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "We can make this better."

questions.hindi: वे किसी भी समस्या का हल निकाल सकते हैं।
questions.english: They can find a solution to any problem.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "They can find a solution to any problem."

questions.hindi: मैं यह पहले नहीं कर सकता था।
questions.english: I could not do this before.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I could not do this before."

questions.hindi: क्या तुम मुझे रास्ता बता सकते हो?
questions.english: Can you show me the way?
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Can you show me the way?"

questions.hindi: वह किसी भी मशीन को ठीक कर सकती है।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "She can repair any machine."

questions.hindi: हम एक साथ काम कर सकते हैं।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + can + base verb (ability, permission, possibility)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "We can work together."
